scenarios.title: Agent refresh performs sourced online research

gherkin.given: valid v2 configuration and a manual place-based rental research refresh
gherkin.when: the research agent investigates both segments in both markets through current online sources
gherkin.then: all four units and nine categories receive independent eligible or attempted evidence, validate, and remain uncommitted for review

linkedTests: tests/palm-springs-rental-market-lab.spec.mjs::Regression: SCN-005-001 researched payload exposes four truthful units and no fixture authority

linkedTestDetails.testId: Regression: SCN-005-001 researched payload exposes four truthful units and no fixture authority

scenarios.title: Missing configuration blocks the product

gherkin.given: required v2 configuration is missing or unreadable
gherkin.when: either route boots
gherkin.then: configuration is unavailable, payload requests stop, and no market, segment, result, or owner-read metric is substituted

linkedTests: tests/palm-springs-rental-market-lab.spec.mjs::Regression: SCN-005-002 missing configuration blocks payload fetch and every output

linkedTestDetails.testId: Regression: SCN-005-002 missing configuration blocks payload fetch and every output

scenarios.title: A valid stale payload remains visibly stale

gherkin.given: a valid selected pair payload is older than its configured threshold
gherkin.when: Simple, Power, and the owner read render
gherkin.then: all projections retain STALE, age, threshold, pair identity, and no current or live claim

linkedTests: tests/palm-springs-rental-market-lab.spec.mjs::Regression: SCN-005-003 stale research stays stale in Simple Power and owner read

linkedTestDetails.testId: Regression: SCN-005-003 stale research stays stale in Simple Power and owner read

scenarios.title: An invalid payload produces no conclusion

gherkin.given: a market payload violates schema, pair, category, qualification, reference, or bound rules
gherkin.when: shared validation runs
gherkin.then: specific v2 errors appear and no thesis, projection, result, or numeric owner read is produced

linkedTests: tests/palm-springs-rental-market-lab.spec.mjs::Regression: SCN-005-004 invalid payload produces errors and no conclusion

linkedTestDetails.testId: Regression: SCN-005-004 invalid payload produces errors and no conclusion

scenarios.title: User shock levers recompute without research fetch

gherkin.given: one valid selected market-segment scenario
gherkin.when: the user changes pair-valid market, risk, acquisition, financing, or cost controls
gherkin.then: one deterministic result updates synchronously with zero post-boot research requests and unchanged observations, coverage, forecasts, and thesis

linkedTests: tests/palm-springs-rental-market-lab.spec.mjs::Regression: SCN-005-005 pair levers recompute with zero post-boot requests

linkedTestDetails.testId: Regression: SCN-005-005 pair levers recompute with zero post-boot requests

scenarios.title: Demand and supply shocks obey the bounded occupancy equation

gherkin.given: finite base occupancy and configured demand and supply deltas
gherkin.when: shared occupancy computation runs
gherkin.then: the exact clamped demand-over-supply equation applies and an invalid denominator returns unavailable without a number

linkedTests: tests/palm-springs-rental-market-lab.spec.mjs::Regression: SCN-005-006 occupancy equation clamps and rejects an invalid denominator

linkedTestDetails.testId: Regression: SCN-005-006 occupancy equation clamps and rejects an invalid denominator

scenarios.title: Incompatible metric definitions remain separate

gherkin.given: similarly named metrics have different definitions, populations, periods, samples, or pair applicability
gherkin.when: Power compares them
gherkin.then: both definitions remain visible, incompatibility is named, and no conversion or aggregate is created

linkedTests: tests/palm-springs-rental-market-lab.spec.mjs::Regression: SCN-005-007 incompatible occupancy definitions remain separate and unaggregated

linkedTestDetails.testId: Regression: SCN-005-007 incompatible occupancy definitions remain separate and unaggregated

scenarios.title: Buyer economics use standard amortizing debt service

gherkin.given: a positive price, valid down payment, finite rate, and positive term
gherkin.when: shared buyer economics run
gherkin.then: standard amortization, gross yield, explicit costs, and pre-tax cash flow share one unrounded pair result

linkedTests: tests/palm-springs-rental-market-lab.spec.mjs::Regression: SCN-005-008 buyer economics use standard amortization in one result

linkedTestDetails.testId: Regression: SCN-005-008 buyer economics use standard amortization in one result

scenarios.title: Zero-rate financing remains finite

gherkin.given: positive principal, zero annual rate, and positive payment count
gherkin.when: shared debt service runs
gherkin.then: monthly principal equals principal divided by payments and annual debt and cash flow remain finite

linkedTests: tests/palm-springs-rental-market-lab.spec.mjs::Regression: SCN-005-009 zero-rate financing stays finite

linkedTestDetails.testId: Regression: SCN-005-009 zero-rate financing stays finite

scenarios.title: Negative cash flow remains explicit

gherkin.given: revenue is below variable costs, fixed-risk costs, and debt service
gherkin.when: economics render
gherkin.then: pre-tax cash flow remains signed negative and no confidence or gross-yield label softens it

linkedTests: tests/palm-springs-rental-market-lab.spec.mjs::Regression: SCN-005-010 negative cash flow remains signed and explicit everywhere

linkedTestDetails.testId: Regression: SCN-005-010 negative cash flow remains signed and explicit everywhere

scenarios.title: Mobile and desktop share one Simple and Power decision

gherkin.given: one valid selected pair and assumption set
gherkin.when: either route switches mode or viewport
gherkin.then: pair, coverage, thesis, scenario, outputs, costs, stale state, result identity, accessibility, and layout remain equivalent

scenarios.title: Every material claim is source traceable

gherkin.given: a displayed material claim, membership, baseline, or cost-risk assumption
gherkin.when: the user inspects provenance
gherkin.then: a complete pair-supporting source record resolves, untrusted text remains inert, links are safe, and focus returns exactly

scenarios.title: Previous-refresh changes require a prior payload

gherkin.given: a valid prior unit exists for the same pair
gherkin.when: a new matching unit is authored
gherkin.then: every material entity is classified exactly once and every assumption revision cites evidence

scenarios.title: First refresh invents no change history

gherkin.given: no prior valid unit exists for the same pair
gherkin.when: the first unit is authored
gherkin.then: change mode is baseline with null prior identity, zero records, and no prior-relative direction claim

scenarios.title: Failed research never becomes fabricated data

gherkin.given: a required source is inaccessible or unverifiable
gherkin.when: the refresh completes
gherkin.then: the category records attempted context and consequence while no snippet, prior value, quote, sample, or inference is invented

linkedTests: tests/palm-springs-rental-market-lab.spec.mjs::Regression: SCN-005-015 inaccessible research remains unknown without a value

scenarios.title: Observed evidence, assumptions, inference, and scenario output remain distinct

gherkin.given: a unit contains historical evidence, assumptions, inference, and projected output
gherkin.when: the records validate and render
gherkin.then: each carries one visible class with proper lineage and user output never becomes research

scenarios.title: Legal supply does not silently become active supply

gherkin.given: legal eligibility, certificates or endorsements, inspections, caps, and OTA listings exist
gherkin.when: supply evidence and controls render
gherkin.then: each population remains distinct and any supply delta names its assumption or inference

scenarios.title: Owner read preserves unavailable and stale states

gherkin.given: either route renders a current, stale, sparse, incomplete, or unavailable pair state
gherkin.when: it publishes and Market Brief consumes its owner read
gherkin.then: route, pair, coverage, truth, caveat, valid metrics, omissions, and owning deep link remain faithful

scenarios.title: Market and segment switching consumes one matching result

gherkin.given: both markets and both mandatory segments are configured
gherkin.when: the user changes route market or segment
gherkin.then: matching thesis, coverage, scenario, baselines, assumptions, result, modes, and owner read commit atomically with no prior-pair fallback

scenarios.title: Five bedrooms alone do not qualify luxury

gherkin.given: a property has at least five bedrooms
gherkin.when: large-luxury membership is evaluated
gherkin.then: entire-home and every configured luxury gate must pass; marketing, price, bedroom count, or one amenity cannot qualify; missing gates remain unknown

scenarios.title: Sparse segment evidence remains visible

gherkin.given: a luxury candidate or qualifying intersection is sparse or unknown
gherkin.when: a thesis, metric, forecast, baseline, or comparison is produced
gherkin.then: counts, sample n, denominator and method, missing fields, and confidence consequence remain visible and never appear complete

scenarios.title: Whole-market performance cannot become observed luxury performance

gherkin.given: broad performance or all-home prices exist while matching luxury observations do not
gherkin.when: large-luxury analysis is produced
gherkin.then: no broad value is copied, multiplied, or premium-adjusted into an observed segment field; it remains unknown or explicit assumption

scenarios.title: Segment and market deltas require aligned bases

gherkin.when: basis signatures are checked

scenarios.title: Segment acquisition baselines disclose sample and status

gherkin.given: active asks, closed sales, or broad prices are available
gherkin.when: an acquisition baseline is proposed
gherkin.then: pair, status, filters, deduplication, sample n, statistic, range, period, exclusions, and legal unknowns are disclosed and only a clean matching sample can yield a baseline

scenarios.title: Remaining-2026 and 2027 scenarios are falsifiable, not factual

gherkin.given: a pair has aligned evidence or an explicit baseline gap
gherkin.when: remaining-2026 and 2027 scenarios are authored
gherkin.then: baseline, assumptions, inference, output, method/version, sample coverage, sources, confidence, and pair-specific falsifiers remain separate and low-coverage output is assumption-driven or unavailable

operationalContracts.title: Every finding is fixed or routed

gherkin.given: Scopes 1 through 4 have completed their planned delivery contracts
gherkin.when: Scope 5 executes the focused and broad product and governance checks against current bytes
gherkin.then: every result is recorded without truncation or fabrication and every finding is fixed and revalidated in-owner or routed explicitly

linkedTests: .github/bubbles/scripts/traceability-guard.sh

linkedTestDetails.testId: PBRM-TRACEABILITY

supersededV1Scenarios.title: Agent refresh performs sourced online research

gherkin.given: valid config and a clean payload-owned path for one manual refresh
gherkin.when: the research agent performs current online research across all six configured categories
gherkin.then: every category has eligible evidence or an explicit attempted-source unknown, every material claim resolves, and the valid proposal remains uncommitted

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-005-001 researched payload exposes six truthful categories and no fixture authority

gherkin.given: the real static server returns HTTP 404 for the closed missing-config fixture path
gherkin.when: the production boot sequence resolves and validates configuration
gherkin.then: the visible truth band names INVALID CONFIGURATION and PSRM-CONFIG-FETCH, no payload request occurs, and no substitute output renders

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-005-002 missing configuration blocks payload fetch and every output

supersededV1Scenarios.title: A valid stale payload remains visibly stale

gherkin.given: checked-in fixture contracts validate and the explicit fixture clock is after staleAfter
gherkin.when: Simple and Power render
gherkin.then: both show the same STALE word, age, and threshold, the owner read stays stale, and no text calls the research current or live

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-005-003 stale research stays stale in Simple Power and owner read

supersededV1Scenarios.title: An invalid payload produces no conclusion

gherkin.given: fixture configuration is valid and the checked-in invalid payload has a dangling source reference and missing required category
gherkin.when: the extracted production validator and production page process it
gherkin.then: PSRM-PAYLOAD-REF and PSRM-PAYLOAD-CATEGORY are visible and no thesis, projection, deterministic result, or numeric owner metric is produced

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-005-004 invalid payload produces errors and no conclusion

supersededV1Scenarios.title: User shock levers recompute without research fetch

gherkin.given: one valid view model rendered from real same-origin fixture reads
gherkin.when: the user changes year, scenario, market, purchase, leverage, rate, and expense controls
gherkin.then: one production compute emits a synchronous result, research digests remain unchanged, and zero requests occur after initial contract reads

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-005-005 levers recompute synchronously with zero post-boot requests

supersededV1Scenarios.title: Demand and supply shocks obey the bounded occupancy equation

gherkin.given: base occupancy is 0.40, demand delta is 0.10, and supply delta is 0.25
gherkin.when: the extracted production computeAdjustedOccupancy function runs
gherkin.then: the exact clamped equation result is returned and an invalid denominator returns PSRM-MODEL-OCCUPANCY-DENOMINATOR with no number

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-005-006 occupancy equation clamps and rejects an invalid denominator

gherkin.given: paid managed-home occupancy and booked available-night OTA occupancy are both valid observations
gherkin.when: Power and the Source Inspector expose their evidence
gherkin.then: values and definitions remain separate, a DefinitionConflict names incompatibility, and no aggregate or conversion exists

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-005-007 incompatible occupancy definitions remain separate and unaggregated

supersededV1Scenarios.title: Buyer economics use standard amortizing debt service

gherkin.given: positive bound-valid purchase, leverage, annual-rate, and loan-term inputs
gherkin.when: the extracted production computeRentalModel function runs
gherkin.then: monthly payment uses standard amortization and annual debt, yield, expense, and cash flow share one unrounded result

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-005-008 buyer economics use standard amortization in one result

gherkin.given: positive principal, zero annual mortgage rate, and a positive integer payment count
gherkin.when: the extracted production computeMonthlyPayment function runs
gherkin.then: monthly payment equals principal divided by payments and annual debt service and cash flow remain finite

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-005-009 zero-rate financing stays finite

gherkin.given: gross revenue is lower than operating expense plus annual debt service
gherkin.when: Simple, Power, and the owner-read receipt render the shared result
gherkin.then: cash flow remains signed negative, NEGATIVE CASH FLOW precedes yield commentary, and no positive acquisition label appears

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-005-010 negative cash flow remains signed and explicit everywhere

supersededV1Scenarios.title: Mobile and desktop share one Simple and Power decision

gherkin.given: one valid fixture and one UserAssumptionSet
gherkin.when: the page renders at desktop and mobile sizes and switches Simple and Power
gherkin.then: truth, thesis, confidence, scenario, outputs, and digest match with no overflow, clipped focus, pointer-only control, or chart/table mismatch

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-005-011 desktop mobile Simple Power decisions stay identical

supersededV1Scenarios.title: Every material claim is source traceable

gherkin.given: a displayed material claim has validated supporting source references
gherkin.when: the user opens and closes the native Source Inspector
gherkin.then: every reference resolves with scope, period, access, rights, and limitations, text and links stay safe, and focus returns exactly

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-005-012 source inspector resolves provenance and restores exact focus

supersededV1Scenarios.title: Previous-refresh changes require a prior payload

gherkin.given: a valid compared test payload names the immediately prior valid payload identity
gherkin.when: extracted production change validation and the real page process it
gherkin.then: every material entity has exactly one change record and every scenario or acquisition revision has sourced reasoning

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-005-013 compared refresh accounts for every material entity

supersededV1Scenarios.title: First refresh invents no change history

gherkin.given: the initial researched payload has no prior valid predecessor
gherkin.when: payload validation and the Change Ledger process baseline mode
gherkin.then: prior identity fields are null, changes are empty, and no prior-relative directional claim appears

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-005-014 baseline refresh invents no prior change

supersededV1Scenarios.title: Failed research never becomes fabricated data

gherkin.given: one required source in the labeled failed-source fixture is inaccessible
gherkin.when: production validation and the real page process that category
gherkin.then: the source remains an unverified attempt without a value, the category stays unknown, and it cannot support a thesis metric or forecast

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-005-015 inaccessible research remains unknown without a value

supersededV1Scenarios.title: Observed forecast and inference remain distinct

gherkin.given: claims and series contain observed, forecast, and inference classifications
gherkin.when: Simple, Power, chart, table, and Source Inspector render
gherkin.then: each item exposes one word and non-color mark, method/input lineage resolves, and user outputs use MODELED FROM USER ASSUMPTIONS

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-005-016 observed forecast inference and modeled outputs stay distinct

supersededV1Scenarios.title: Legal supply does not silently become active supply

gherkin.given: the payload contains certificates, caps, waitlist, and OTA active-listing observations
gherkin.when: Power evidence and the Simple supply control render
gherkin.then: legal facts, marketplace observations, and supply assumptions remain separate and no certificate-to-listing conversion exists

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-005-017 legal and active supply remain separate from scenario assumptions

supersededV1Scenarios.title: Owner read preserves unavailable and stale states

gherkin.given: the registered tool renders current, stale, unavailable, or invalid-input state
gherkin.when: it publishes its strict owner read and Market Brief consumes registry coverage
gherkin.then: state, direction, confidence, scenario, and caveat remain faithful, invalid numerics are omitted, and the consumer deep-links without copying research or equations

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-005-018 registered owner read preserves current stale unavailable and omissions

supersededV1Scenarios.title: Superseded v1 complete protected matrix check

gherkin.given: all Feature 005 implementation and consumer scopes are complete
gherkin.when: the full Node, validator, static-page, Playwright, and governance checks execute from the repository root
gherkin.then: every protected scenario has a real non-silent assertion, fixtures are not market proof, and every finding is fixed and revalidated

linkedTests.testId: Superseded v1 complete Palm Springs protected matrix check
